title: UoYeet Football Display Case with Ball Holder, Clear Display Box for Full Size Football Soccer Volleyballs, Sports Memorabilia Showcase
features: Easy to Assembly, Enjoy a hassle-free setup with our football display case. Thoughtfully designed for easy assembly, the included User Manual provides clear instructions. Build your showcase confidently, ensuring a secure and sturdy display for your valued football collectibles.

Unmatched Visibility: Revel in the stunning clarity of our 3mm (1/8") thick acrylic box with 95% transmittance. Enjoy an unobstructed 360° view from every angle, showcasing your cherished football like never before. No visual restrictions, just pure clarity!

Versatile Ball Stand for All Your Sports Treasures: Whether it's footballs, basketballs, volleyballs, or soccer balls, our display stand accommodates them all. Adjustable and stable, it ensures an impressive showcase for sports balls of various sizes. A versatile solution for sports enthusiasts!

Dustproof Design Protect Your Possessions: Precision laser cutting ensures a seamless fit, virtually eliminating gaps and keeping dust and corrosion at bay. The added lid allows for easy access while providing a dustproof solution. Your showcased footballs remain protected and pristine.

Every Detail Matters: Crafted with care, our display case features smooth edges and chamfered corners, safeguarding your collectibles from scratches. We include a pair of disposable gloves and a cleaning cloth to prevent fingerprints during assembly. Trust in the professional-grade quality and durability of our product.
